pi_items.source: setup_task.sh dynamically creates the patient with firstName 'Maria' and lastName 'Santos'.
setup_task.sh creates the document at path /patient_p1_P00003 in CouchDB.

setup_task.sh dynamically seeds the database with pricing_p1_XRAY001 ('X-Ray - Chest PA' at 125.00) and pricing_p1_OFFICE001 ('Office Visit - Level 3' at 250.00). The expected quantity of 1 for each item comes directly from the task instructions.

privileged_info_summary: The patient 'Maria Santos' (patientId 'P00003', CouchDB document 'patient_p1_P00003') and two pricing items ('X-Ray - Chest PA' at 125.00 and 'Office Visit - Level 3' at 250.00) are synthetically generated and dynamically injected via setup scripts. The target task invoice quantities are 1 for both items.
